description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house surrounded by dense landscaping, including mature trees and shrubs on all sides. The structure features clean, geometric lines with a mix of light and dark exterior materials, likely concrete, glass, and wood. Large windows and glass railings are visible, suggesting an emphasis on natural light and outdoor views. The house appears to have a rooftop terrace or balcony area, partially enclosed by glass panels. The entryway is partially sheltered by a wooden pergola and is set back from the main facade, providing privacy. The overall design integrates the house seamlessly into its green surroundings, creating a private and contemporary residential retreat.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, glass railings, and surrounded by dense trees and shrubs. The design features clean lines, a rooftop terrace, and a partially sheltered entryway.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entryway with a wooden pergola, dense trees partially obscuring the facade, and a glimpse of the rooftop terrace.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the extensive tree coverage, large windows, and the glass railings of the rooftop terrace.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the flat roof, more of the rooftop terrace, and the integration of the house with the surrounding greenery.
description_view_3: This view shows another angle of the entryway, the flat roof, and the dense landscaping, with the house partially hidden by trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass railings
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a wooden pergola, partially sheltered, and surrounded by dense landscaping
